sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104514" key="tragw|dopoda/gra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰγῳδο-ποδάγρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, name of a serio-comic <sense id="n104514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drama descriptive of the miseries of the gout,</tr_> ascribed to Lucian.</sense> </entryFree>
